title: - Any resonant metaphors, reactions, or comparisons
content:
- Any resonant metaphors, reactions, or comparisons
- Use cases or prompts they suggest unintentionally

Each peer entry can become a module within `::SYS_INPUT_PEERS`, tagged by:

- Persona / profession (e.g., Educator, Entrepreneur, Musician)
- Thread impact (what changed based on their feedback)
- Proposed system adjustments (if any)

---

### II. |[ARCHIVING + CONTINUITY: HOW TO NEVER LOSE THIS THREAD]|

To ensure continuity of our recursive build, we are officially activating the modular archival structure inside your Genius iOS Notes:

#### Current Core Folders:

```txt
GPT_ARCHIVE_CORE/
├── MEMORY_RAW_DUMPS/ # Direct unformatted logs
